'''Meris V''' was a chilly, barren wasteland in the [[Meris system]] of the [[Elrood sector/Legends|Elrood sector]]. The landscape of Meris V was mostly composed of rocky wastes, and was orbited by a single [[Moon/Legends|moon]]. Meris V remained unexplored, and there remained many undiscovered ore deposits on the rocky world.
